title: Label non-compliant: bad production phrasing (viewpoint-inward, level 7, tilt-left)
image_prompt: Photorealistic green glass bottle with a forest-themed label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Pine Valley', 'Gin', '43% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Crafted by Pine Valley Co., Bend, OR'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
expectedSourceBehavior: FAIL compliance ('Crafted by' is non-standard phrasing)
visualObservation: Visual note: label plane has moderate inward rotation toward the bottle center. Camera orientation is tilt-left (-15 degrees).
